Package gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model

Class Event

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbAudit
gov.cdc.izgateway.dynamodb.model.Event
All Implemented Interfaces:
gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DbAudit, gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbEntity, Serializable
public class Event extends gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbAudit implements gov.cdc.izgateway.model.DynamoDbEntity, Serializable
Supports Event Tracking
Author:
Audacious Inquiry
